raw_comment:
I notice that there is a higher percent of players of color than coaches of color. I notice that the highest percents are in the WNBA and the NBA. The lowest percents are in the MLB.

I wonder why the highest percents of diversity are with the players rather than the coaches. I also wonder why there is a higher diversity in the NBA. 

This can impact me and my community in many ways. It can direct the young players who are trying to become professional athletes to know what kind of chance they have at becoming an athlete. 

This graph is showing multiple percentages about the diversity in professional sports. My headline would be “Diversity of players and coaches in Professional Sports Leagues”
